title: Apricot Jam
excerpt: Ingredients 2 kg apricots 2kg sugar juice of 1 lemon 500ml water Method Wash the apricots. Halve and remove the pits. Layer apricots and sugar in the pot you're going to cook it in. I put in about 5 pits as well. You just have to take …
html:
Ingredients

  • 2 kg apricots
  • 2kg sugar
  • juice of 1 lemon
  • 500ml water

Method

  1. Wash the apricots.
  2. Halve and remove the pits.
  3. Layer apricots and sugar in the pot you're going to cook it in. I put in about 5 pits as well. You just have to take them out at the end of the cooking process.
  4. Squeeze the lemon juice over the apricots.
  5. Let it stand overnight or for a few hours.
  6. Cook slowly at first until all the sugar has dissolved. Stir the whole time
  7. Turn up the heat and now cook for about 30 minutes. Stir the whole time and skim off the foam. Once it reaches 105 degrees C, your jam is ready.
  8. Spoon into sterilised bottles and enjoy.
